about.hero_alt: School of Engineering and Technology - Vinh University
about.hero_subtext: Under Vinh University – National key higher education institution in the North Central region of Vietnam
about.overview_p1: The School of Engineering and Technology (SET) is a training unit under Vinh University, established in 2026 by upgrading the Institute of Engineering and Technology (founded April 2017). The school inherits over 20 years of tradition in training high-quality engineering and technology programs.
about.overview_p2: With a faculty team comprising Professors, Associate Professors, and Doctors with high professional qualifications, modern facilities, and an extensive international cooperation network, SET is the leading prestigious training institution in the North Central region.
about.overview_p3: The school is committed to training high-quality human resources, meeting the needs of digital transformation and Industry 4.0, aiming to become the leading center for engineering and technology training and research in the region.
about.overview_img_alt: Campus of the School of Engineering and Technology
about.video_heading: Explore the School of Engineering and Technology
about.video_subtext: Discover the campus, laboratories and modern learning environment at the School of Engineering and Technology - Vinh University.
about.video_caption: Introduction video of the School of Engineering and Technology - Vinh University
about.timeline_subtext: Looking back at the golden milestones marking the remarkable development of the School of Engineering and Technology.
about.timeline_2002_desc: Vinh University officially opened and enrolled the first cohort in Information Technology and Electronics - Telecommunications Engineering, laying the historical foundation for the key technology sector.
about.timeline_2007_desc: Added Electrical - Electronics Engineering and Automation programs. Student enrollment grew rapidly, affirming the leading technical training position in the North Central region.
about.timeline_2013_desc: Applied the international CDIO training methodology (Conceive – Design – Implement – Operate), enhancing practical quality and real-world working capability for students.
about.timeline_2017_desc: In April 2017, the Institute of Engineering and Technology was established by merging technical training programs from the former Faculty of Physics - Technology, creating a major breakthrough.
about.timeline_2023_desc: Achieved education quality accreditation standards set by the Ministry of Education and Training, affirming training reputation and quality.
about.timeline_2026_desc: Officially announced the establishment of the School of Engineering and Technology under Vinh University. A historic turning point opening a new era.
about.mission_desc: Training high-quality engineering and technology human resources; conducting scientific research and transferring advanced technology; contributing to the socio-economic development of the North Central region and the country.
about.vision_desc: By 2030, become the leading prestigious center for engineering and technology training and research in the region; towards international standards, contributing to Vinh University's goal of reaching the top 500 Asian universities.
about.values_desc: Quality – Creativity – Integration – Responsibility. Learner-centered, research-led training, international cooperation to broaden knowledge.
about.departments_subtext: The school offers 8 programs/specializations in engineering and technology, meeting the demand for high-quality human resources.
about.leadership_subtext: Experienced leadership team passionate about education and training.
about.leader_1_name: Assoc. Prof. Dr. Nguyen Hoai Son
about.facilities_desc: The school possesses a modern facility system meeting CDIO training requirements, serving teaching and scientific research activities.
about.facility_lab_desc: Over 15 specialized labs: IT Lab, Network Lab, Electrical-Electronics Lab, Automation Lab, Automotive Lab, HVAC Lab.
about.facility_wifi_desc: Campus-wide WiFi coverage, high-speed LAN network system for teaching and research.
about.facility_library_desc: Digital library with tens of thousands of documents, e-books and access to international databases.
about.facility_digital_desc: Comprehensive digital university platform: training management, finance, digital library and science management.
about.partners_desc: The school has signed MOUs with many international universities and research institutes. Activities: faculty-student exchange, joint research, technology transfer.
about.achievement_1_desc: Achieved education quality accreditation standards set by the Ministry of Education and Training.
about.achievement_2_desc: Multidisciplinary academic journal meeting Crossref, DOAJ, Google Scholar standards.
about.achievement_3_desc: Students winning national and international programming and STEM innovation competitions.
about.achievement_4_desc: Many faculty members recognized as Associate Professors and Doctors annually in engineering fields.
about.achievement_5_desc: Research collaboration with international groups from Japan, South Korea, Australia, and France.
about.contact_cta_text: Want to learn more about academic programs, research opportunities or admissions? Get in touch with us today.
about.meta_title: About - School of Engineering and Technology | Vinh University
about.meta_description: Learn about the School of Engineering and Technology at Vinh University: History, mission, academic programs, faculty, facilities and achievements.
